seoTitle: Rocky Point vs Rogues Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rocky Point and Rogues Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rocky Point vs Rogues Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rocky Point and Rogues Point.
heading: Rocky Point vs Rogues Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rocky Point, South Australia and Rogues Point, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rogues Point has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Rocky Point (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rocky Point or Rogues Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rocky Point has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Rogues Point scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rocky Point scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Rogues Point scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rocky Point or Rogues Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rogues Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
